overall_cve.delta_vs_prior_run: April MTD moved 4593 (day 23) → 4772 (day 24): +179 CVEs net over 24h. Back-population dominated by Apr 23 overnight: 29 → 187 (+158). Apr 22 stable at 355. Apr 21 micro-adjusted 359 → 357. Apr 20 stable at 166. Apr 24 same-day 23 and will grow. Fully-populated-day average (Apr 20-22) is ~293/day. Full-month extrapolation down slightly from 5991 → 5965 (-0.4%). April continues tracking 5-5.5% below March (6304) and on-pace with the conservative Glasswing anchor (not the aggressive one). Counter-argument: 2-8 week NVD publishing latency means Glasswing-disclosed CVEs may not yet be visible in April totals; mid-to-late May is when a Mythos-attributable inflection would first be measurable.

kev_additions.reconciliation_note: Two new KEV entries since prior run — both were already on our exploit_watch_list as 'watching' with 'weaponized' maturity: CVE-2026-33825 (Microsoft Defender 'BlueHammer' LPE, added 2026-04-22) and CVE-2026-39987 (Marimo pre-auth RCE, added 2026-04-23). Both moved to 'confirmed' status in config.json with kevDate recorded. April total now 24 (exactly at Q1 2026 monthly average of ~24). Two consecutive days of additions after the 3-day quiet period (Apr 20-22).

watch_list_kev_promotions_this_run.prediction_rationale: Pre-patch PoC leak on 2026-04-03 + first ITW attacks 2026-04-10 + Apr 16 additional activity — clear KEV-eligibility profile
Sysdig honeypot 662 exploit events Apr 11-14 + NKAbuse variant deployment + pre-auth WebSocket RCE attack surface

notable_entries: CVE-2026-33825 — Microsoft Defender 'BlueHammer' LPE (2026-04-22). Watch list confirmation; weaponized since Apr 3 PoC leak; Microsoft (Glasswing participant). Sister 0-days RedSun and UnDefend still unpatched and not KEV-listed.
CVE-2026-39987 — Marimo pre-auth RCE (2026-04-23). Watch list confirmation; ITW within 9h 41m of disclosure; Sysdig documented NKAbuse delivery.
CVE-2026-20122 / 20128 / 20133 — Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager cluster (2026-04-20). Cisco (Glasswing participant).

confirmed_glasswing: CVE-2026-4747 (FreeBSD NFS RCE — Anthropic/Carlini autonomous find)
claude_assisted_non_anthropic: CVE-2026-34197 (Apache ActiveMQ — Horizon3.ai / Naveen Sunkavally using Claude as tool; NOT direct Anthropic credit)
glasswing_cves.source: Web searches 2026-04-24 against 'Mythos vulnerability', 'Glasswing CVE', 'Claude vulnerability discovery', 'Carlini CVE': no new Claude-credited CVE disclosures surfaced between 2026-04-23 and 2026-04-24. Firefox 150 MFSA 2026-30 credit set unchanged (3 Claude-credited CVEs out of 41 CVE-tier fixes, out of 271 total Mythos-pass identified). Glasswing total holding at 283 Mythos-linked fixes, 6 explicit-credit CVEs.
glasswing_cves.notes: Counter-argument: 24-hour window is narrow; AI-attributed disclosures often appear in press follow-on reporting 3-7 days after the initial advisory. A quiet day is not evidence of a slowdown.

ms_patch_tuesday.source: Tenable blog, Krebs on Security, MSRC (value unchanged since 2026-04-14 release)
ms_patch_tuesday.ranking: Second-largest Patch Tuesday ever; shy of October 2025 (167).

rhel8_errata.source: Estimate retained from prior run. stack.watch parent page continues to return only YTD aggregate. Red Hat security data API still 404s.
rhel8_errata.confidence: low — placeholder; true April count likely 20-30 but not precisely determinable from available sources

weekly_cve.observation: W17 at 1088 through Apr 24 (5 partial days), with Apr 20-22 fully populated at 293/day. Extrapolating 293/day across 7 days → 2,051; but likely W17 final lands 1,400-1,700 after back-population stabilizes. W16 still the slowest measured week at 168/day. Still too early to call a post-Glasswing inflection either way; expected earliest-detectable window is mid-May.

exploit_intelligence.summary: 6 of 14 watch list CVEs are weaponized (all 6 KEV-listed). 1 is functional (CVE-2026-21858 Ni8mare). 2 are PoC-available (Thymeleaf cluster). 5 are at maturity 'none'. Two new KEV confirmations this run, both correctly predicted by the watch list.

watch_list_precision_metric.precision_so_far: 6/6 of confirmed-status entries were analyst predictions that KEV validated within the watch window (0-8 days from watch-list add to KEV listing)

vendor_advisory_flags.notes: KEV-listing on disclosure day implies attacker-discovery-before-disclosure, which disqualifies from the probable-participant-self-scan bucket under current criteria. Already captured in prior run; no change.

mythos_monitoring.search_coverage_note: Google News searches run on 2026-04-24 covered Mythos, Glasswing, Claude-credited CVEs, Firefox 150, Cisco advisories, and Marimo/Defender KEV confirmations. Intel/Palo Alto/Apple/Broadcom/Chrome-releases advisory searches not run this pass due to rate-limiting; will re-run at next cadence. Counter-argument: 24-hour gap is small and skipping these vendors risks missing self-scan candidates — flagged for follow-up.

np_di_scan_coverage_note: OSV ecosystem scan not run this pass; NVD same-day (2026-04-24) produced 23 new CVEs which will not have full CVSS enrichment for 24-72h. Flagging for the analyst agent to review OSV Critical/High for the period 2026-04-22 through 2026-04-24 in the full scan tomorrow. Counter-argument: a light-scan pass risks missing an NP+DI candidate disclosed today that an attacker could weaponize before our next run.

projection_comparison.verdict: on_track_conservative — April extrapolation (~5965) is exactly at the conservative-anchor value and ~2x below the aggressive scenario's eventual trajectory. March (6304) remains the highest month on record; April is tracking to land ~5.4% below March.
projection_comparison.counter_argument: Conservative matching is partly an artifact of the anchor methodology: we set the anchor equal to the current extrapolation. The real test is May-June, when Glasswing-triggered disclosures should start appearing in NVD data after the typical 2-8 week publishing latency. A steady April does not prove Glasswing has zero effect.
